meaning: n.(私人、社团、医院、监狱、贵族、私人教堂、军中等的)牧师
examples: He joined the 40th Division as an army chaplain.
Among his other duties, he acted both as the ship's surgeon and as chaplain for the men.
Then why not consult the company chaplain?
As brigade chaplain, Fenton was the one who flew to see the wounded and dead.
Chaplain Douglas Fenton is quite matter-of-fact as he tells the story of the severed foot.
